overall.description: Spider-Man game footage showing the character perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-inspired intersection. The scene features towering glass buildings, bright digital billboards, and busy street traffic below on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper rooftop ledge overlooking major commercial intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouched on a concrete building ledge, surveying the busy city street and intersection below

entered.detail: Tall modern glass office building with reflective windows rising vertically along the left side of the frame
High-rise building facade covered with large digital advertising screens displaying colorful animated content
Large red billboard with white text visible at the end of the street canyon, surrounded by other digital displays
Multi-lane city avenue filled with moving traffic including yellow taxis and various vehicles
Concrete rooftop ledge with metal railing where the character is perched, providing an elevated vantage point

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man remains perched on a high-rise building ledge overlooking a vibrant urban intersection reminiscent of Times Square. The scene is dominated by towering glass skyscrapers on both sides, massive digital billboards in the distance, and steady traffic flow on the multi-lane street below. The character maintains a crouched, observant posture throughout the static shot, surveying the bustling cityscape under bright midday sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, observant perspective from a high-altitude vantage point overlooking a vibrant urban intersection. It begins with Spider-Man perched in a crouched posture on a high-rise building ledge, surveying the sprawling cityscape below. As the camera lingers, the view emphasizes the scale of the surrounding glass skyscrapers and the glow of massive digital billboards in the distance. The scene remains focused on the bustling activity of the multi-lane street, where steady traffic flows under the bright, clear light of midday sunlight.
